action.reasoning: Observation: Another 6-epoch low-LR fine-tune completed in ~9.5 minutes but best_val_mae stayed essentially unchanged at 0.08114622, indicating a plateau. Analysis: Additional same-regime fine-tuning is unlikely to yield meaningful gains, while we still have enough budget for a leaderboard check. The safest high-value action is to submit the current checkpoint, since hidden-test improvements may still occur even when visible val is flat, and this also locks in the latest model state. Decision: submit the current best checkpoint now without changing code.
